response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals, testing practices, and some cloud exposure, he falls significantly short on critical requirements. With only ~1-2 years of C++ experience across his career (vs. the required 8 years), and most recent C++ work 11+ years ago, he lacks the core technical foundation for this role. His background is primarily in web application and service development rather than infrastructure and distributed systems architecture at platform scale.
strengths: Proven track record shipping quality products with strong testing/TDD practices across multiple companies and successful apps (top 10 US App Store)
Hands-on experience with distributed systems, microservices (millions of requests/sec), AWS CDK, and Kubernetes deployment
Demonstrated ability to mentor through workshops, open-source projects (GISCollective), and multiple senior/staff-level roles
concerns: Severely insufficient C++ experience (~1-2 years vs. required 8 years); most recent C++ work was 11+ years ago at National Instruments
Limited production-level cloud compute platform or infrastructure-specific architecture experience—background is primarily web application and service development
No clear evidence of leading cloud, DevOps, or infrastructure engineering teams at scale; recent career gap (Oct 2025–present) raises questions about employment stability
